productDisplayName: Nike Men's As Colorblock Red T-shirt
description: CompositionPolo neck t-shirt with short sleeves, made of 60% cotton, 40% polyester, with red, white, dark blue and maroon stripes, short buttoned placket, nike Swoosh embroidered on the left chest, vented hem, brand tab at the hemline, engineered with Dri-Fit technologyFittingRegularWash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours at 30 degree C Do not use softeners or bleach Remove immediately Do not allow to lay on itself when wet Tumble dry low Cool iron Do not dry clean Whether you're playing tennis or hanging out with your friends, this red-white-dark blue-maroon striped t-shirt from nike will get you noticed. Engineered with Nike's Dri-Fit technology, it will wick away sweat to keep you dry and comfortable, on and off the court. Team it with tracks, shorts or jeans for that sporty look.
